NO APPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF'S EXPARTE APPLICATION TO SET ASIDE SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 10/2/2002 TO DAVID BUTLER, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 IS SCHEDULED TODAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS.
